name: Chipotle Cranberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon adobo sauce from chipotle chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Simmer over low heat for 15 minutes, covered.
3. Turn off the heat and let sit, still covered, for an additional 15 minutes.
4. Transfer the mixture to a food processor.
5. Pulse until reaching the desired consistency, which may range from somewhat coarse to smooth.
6. Serve with turkey or mix with one stick of butter and spread on rolls.
7. Makes 1 1/2 to 2 cups.
